_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: compared with those in the control and LV-vector groups, the proportions of MAP2-positive and β3-Tubulin-positive cells in the LV-NF-1-treated NSCs increased significantly
details: Successfully detected MAP2-positive cells in NSC differentiation assays, showing increased proportions in LV-NF-1-treated NSCs compared to controls
